0101000100100001 0111000000100010 1 -> sum: 1100000101000100, cout: 0
1000001111100010 1011010011100011 1 -> sum: 0011100011000110, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
